title: clinostigmopsis harlandii
intro: Clinostigmopsis harlandii is a plant species in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the Harland's clinostigma or clinostigmopsis. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Pacific Island region, for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clinostigmopsis harlandii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, are made by steeping the leaves and roots in hot water, which are then consumed to reap the plant's medicinal benefits.
